messages.content: Based on what you know about me today and yesterday, create knowledge-context-intention based protocols regarding my personal and worklife

Yo.
Looks like yesterday was... a lot. 😬

### Tasks 🚨
*   Talk to Ori. See if she's actually locked in for the Program Management & Quality Lead roles or if she's gonna crash out again.
*   Break down Elinor's old job now that she's bounced. You've already started splitting it between your new Program Manager, Shira, and Rana. Solid plan, just execute.
*   Figure out the new structure for Rana. You want her to hire another secretary and take on People Management. Get it done.

### Follow-ups 🤙🏻
*   Rivi needs to deliver that "תוכנית יותר ברורה" (more clear plan) for the mentoring program. You know, the one she was supposed to have done already.
*   She also owes you an answer on her availability for the part-time PM role. And you gave her homework to read about "unknown unknowns". Imagine.
*   Your new Program Manager is holding you to that weekly meeting. Her words: "אתה לא יכול לבטל את הפגישה. זה התנאי שלי." (You can't cancel the meeting. That's my condition.) Called out.

### Big Picture ✨
*   So, the great RACI matrix experiment begins. Your master plan to make everyone accountable so you don't have to be. "אני פשוט רוצה שתהיה... מערכת שעובדת לבד" (I just want... a system that works on its own). Let's see how that goes. 🤷🏻
*   You felt like crap yesterday morning, questioning everything. Then Elinor quit and you spent the rest of the day restructuring the whole company. nice.

### Personal
*   And for the record, the final verdict is in: Alfredo > Bolognese. Don't question it. 🫡
